creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please, disconsider the last patch, the correct is to add the dependency on
RUN_DEPENDS instead of BUILD_DEPENDS, here is the new one:


Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.121
diff -u -r1.121 Makefile
--- Makefile	21 Aug 2008 14:39:58 -0000	1.121
+++ Makefile	4 Nov 2008 11:35:49 -0000
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	Mail-SpamAssassin
 PORTVERSION=	3.2.5
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	mail perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_APACHE:S/$/:apache/} ${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN:S/$/:cpan/}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	spamassassin/source/:apache Mail/:cpan
@@ -27,7 +28,8 @@
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS} \
 		${SITE_PERL}/Bundle/LWP.pm:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww \
 		p5-Archive-Tar>=1.23:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/p5-Archive-Tar \
-		${SITE_PERL}/mach/Encode/Detect.pm:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-Encode-Detect
+		${SITE_PERL}/mach/Encode/Detect.pm:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-Encode-Detect \
+		${SITE_PERL}/Package/Constants.pm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Package-Constants
 
 CONFLICTS=	ja-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-[0-9]*
 
-- 
Renato Botelho <garga @ FreeBSD.org>
               <garga @ freebsdbrasil.com.br>

He hath eaten me out of house and home.
		-- William Shakespeare, "Henry IV"
